G4786.strongs_def: to commingle, i.e. (figuratively) to combine or assimilate

G4775.strongs_def: to seat oneself in company with

G4728.derivation: probably from the base of G2476 (ἵστημι);

G4750.derivation: probably strengthened from a presumed derivative of the base of G5114 (τομώτερος);
G4750.strongs_def: the mouth (as if a gash in the face); by implication, language (and its relations); figuratively, an opening (in the earth); specially, the front or edge (of a weapon)

G4756.derivation: feminine of a derivative of (an army;
G4756.strongs_def: from the base of G4766 (στρώννυμι), as encamped); camp-likeness, i.e. an army, i.e. (figuratively) the angels, the celestial luminaries

G4790.strongs_def: to share in company with, i.e. co-participate in
G4790.kjv_def: communicate (have fellowship) with, be partaker of

G4768.strongs_def: to render gloomy, i.e. (by implication) glower (be overcast with clouds, or sombreness of speech)

G4718.derivation: probably from the base of G4735 (στέφανος);
G4718.strongs_def: a cluster of grapes (as if intertwined)

G4747.derivation: neuter of a presumed derivative of the base of G4748 (στοιχέω);
G4747.strongs_def: something orderly in arrangement, i.e. (by implication) a serial (basal, fundamental, initial) constituent (literally), proposition (figuratively)

G4766.derivation: prolongation from a still simpler , (used only as an alternate in certain tenses) (probably akin to G4731 (στερεός) through the idea of positing);
G4766.strongs_def: to "strew," i.e. spread (as a carpet or couch)

G4797.derivation: from G4862 (σύν) and (to pour) or its alternate;
G4797.strongs_def: to commingle promiscuously, i.e. (figuratively) to throw (an assembly) into disorder, to perplex (the mind)
G4797.kjv_def: confound, confuse, stir up, be in an uproar

G4798.strongs_def: to use jointly, i.e. (by implication) to hold intercourse in common

G4710.usage: diligence(5x), haste(2x), business(1x), care(1x), forwardness(1x), carefulness(1x)

G4741.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G2476 (ἵστημι) (like G4731 (στερεός));
G4741.strongs_def: to set fast, i.e. (literally) to turn resolutely in a certain direction, or (figuratively) to confirm

G4781.strongs_def: to bend together, i.e. (figuratively) to afflict

G4785.derivation: from G4862 (σύν) and a compound of G2596 (κατά) and G5585 (ψηφίζω);
G4785.strongs_def: to count down in company with, i.e. enroll among

G4708.strongs_def: more speedily, i.e. sooner than otherwise

G4783.strongs_def: a deposition (of sentiment) in company with, i.e. (figuratively) accord with

G4769.strongs_def: properly akin to the base of G2476 (ἵστημι)); a post ("style"), i.e. (figuratively) support

G4704.strongs_def: to use speed, i.e. to make effort, be prompt or earnest
G4704.kjv_def: do (give) diligence, be diligent (forward), endeavour, labour, study

G4712.derivation: from the base of G2476 (ἵστημι) (as fixed);
G4712.strongs_def: a stade or certain measure of distance; by implication, a stadium or race-course

G4703.strongs_def: a scattering (of seed), i.e. (concretely) seed (as sown)

G4784.strongs_def: to deposit (one's vote or opinion) in company with, i.e. (figuratively) to accord with

G4748.derivation: from a derivative of (to range in regular line);
G4748.strongs_def: to march in (military) rank (keep step), i.e. (figuratively) to conform to virtue and piety

G4753.strongs_def: an armament, i.e. (by implication) a body of troops (more or less extensive or systematic)

G4770.strongs_def: a "Stoic" (as occupying a particular porch in Athens), i.e. adherent of a certin philosophy

G4746.strongs_def: a spread (as if tramped flat) of loose materials for a couch, i.e. (by implication) a bough of a tree so employed

G4762.derivation: strengthened from the base of G5157 (τροπή);
G4762.strongs_def: to twist, i.e. turn quite around or reverse (literally or figuratively)
G4762.kjv_def: convert, turn (again, back again, self, self about)

G4737.strongs_def: to adorn with an honorary wreath (literally or figuratively)

G4714.strongs_def: a standing (properly, the act), i.e. (by analogy) position (existence); by implication, a popular uprising; figuratively, controversy

G4716.strongs_def: a stake or post (as set upright), i.e. (specially), a pole or cross (as an instrument of capital punishment); figuratively, exposure to death, i.e. self-denial; by implication, the atonement of Christ

G4776.strongs_def: to give (or take) a seat in company with

G4761.strongs_def: to wrench, i.e. (specially), to torture (by the rack), but only figuratively, to pervert

G4754.derivation: middle voice from the base of G4756 (στρατιά);
G4754.strongs_def: to serve in a military campaign; figuratively, to execute the apostolate (with its arduous duties and functions), to contend with carnal inclinations

G4774.derivation: from a compound of G4862 (σύν) and G1097 (γινώσκω);

G4706.strongs_def: more earnestly than others), i.e. very promptly

G4778.strongs_def: to maltreat in company with, i.e. (passively) endure persecution together

G4731.strongs_def: stiff, i.e. solid, stable (literally or figuratively)

G4713.derivation: from the base of G2476 (ἵστημι) (as stationary);

G4777.strongs_def: to suffer hardship in company with

G4719.strongs_def: a head of grain (as standing out from the stalk)

G4715.strongs_def: a stander (standard of value), i.e. (specially), a stater or certain coin

G4760.derivation: from the base of G4756 (στρατιά) and the same as G3977 (πεδινός);
G4760.strongs_def: a camping-ground, i.e. (by implication) a body of troops

G4732.strongs_def: to solidify, i.e. confirm (literally or figuratively)

G4729.strongs_def: to hem in closely, i.e. (figuratively) cramp

G4789.strongs_def: a co-heir, i.e. (by analogy) participant in common

G4722.strongs_def: to roof over, i.e. (figuratively) to cover with silence (endure patiently)

G4757.derivation: from a presumed derivative of the same as G4756 (στρατιά);
G4757.strongs_def: a camper-out, i.e. a (common) warrior (literally or figuratively)

G4787.strongs_def: to move together, i.e. (specially), to excite as a mass (to sedition)

G4739.derivation: from the perfect tense of G2476 (ἵστημι);
G4739.strongs_def: to be stationary, i.e. (figuratively) to persevere

G4730.derivation: from a compound of G4728 (στενός) and G5561 (χώρα);

G4724.derivation: probably strengthened from the base of G2476 (ἵστημι);
G4724.strongs_def: properly, to set fast ("stall"), i.e. (figuratively) to repress (reflexively, abstain from associating with)

G4743.strongs_def: a point of time, i.e. an instant

G4795.derivation: from a comparative of G4862 (σύν) and (to light or happen;
G4795.strongs_def: from the base of G2962 (κύριος)); concurrence, i.e. accident

G4749.strongs_def: equipment, i.e. (specially), a "stole" or long-fitting gown (as a mark of dignity)

G4752.strongs_def: military service, i.e. (figuratively) the apostolic career (as one of hardship and danger)

G4794.strongs_def: to stoop altogether, i.e. be completely overcome by

G4727.strongs_def: to make (intransitively, be) in straits, i.e. (by implication) to sigh, murmur, pray inaudibly

G4788.strongs_def: to shut together, i.e. include or (figuratively) embrace in a common subjection to

G4758.derivation: from a compound of the base of G4756 (στρατιά) and G3004 (λέγω) (in its original sense);
G4758.strongs_def: to gather (or select) as a warrior, i.e. enlist in the army

G4792.strongs_def: to convey together, i.e. collect or bear away in company with others

G4717.strongs_def: to impale on the cross; figuratively, to extinguish (subdue) passion or selfishness

G4759.strongs_def: a ruler of an army, i.e. (specially), a Prætorian præfect

G4767.derivation: from a derivative of an obsolete apparently primary (to hate);

G4742.strongs_def: a mark incised or punched (for recognition of ownership), i.e. (figuratively) scar of service

G4723.derivation: a contraction from G4731 (στερεός) (as stiff and unnatural);

G4771.derivation: the personal pronoun of the second person singular;

G4773.strongs_def: a relative (by blood); by extension, a fellow countryman

G4793.strongs_def: to judge of one thing in connection with another, i.e. combine (spiritual ideas with appropriate expressions) or collate (one person with another by way of contrast or resemblance)

G4721.derivation: strengthened from a primary (a "thatch" or "deck" of a building);

G4735.derivation: from an apparently primary (to twine or wreathe);
G4735.strongs_def: a chaplet (as a badge of royalty, a prize in the public games or a symbol of honor generally; but more conspicuous and elaborate than the simple fillet, G1238 (διάδημα)), literally or figuratively

G4702.strongs_def: sown, i.e. (neuter plural) a planted field

G4755.derivation: from the base of G4756 (στρατιά) and G71 (ἄγω) or G2233 (ἡγέομαι);
G4755.strongs_def: a general, i.e. (by implication or analogy) a (military) governor (prætor), the chief (præfect) of the (Levitical) temple-wardens

G4763.derivation: from a presumed derivative of G4764 (στρῆνος);
